template.name: deposit_allocation_reversal
template.description: Reverse an incorrect single-consumer deposit allocation across the Economic and Allocation ledgers by crediting the per-file Clearing (10101) and debiting Customer Hold (20101) on the Economic ledger, and crediting Cash Balances - Clearing (11901) and debiting Consumer FBO Clearing (21101) on the Allocation ledger.

financial_statements_impact.description: Master FBO - Clearing (10101) per-file instance is credited, restoring the clearing balance.
Customer Hold (20101) is debited to reverse the prior credit, decreasing the consumer hold liability.
Cash Balances - Clearing (11901) is credited to reverse the prior debit.
Consumer Master FBO Clearing (21101) is debited to reverse the prior credit.

template.trigger: Analyst-approved reversal of a previously posted single-consumer deposit allocation due to wrong consumer/amount, duplicate allocation, or file pairing error.

ledger_scope_descriptions.allocation_ledger: Allocation ledger (ID 5002) where Cash Balances and consumer FBO Main positions are reversed.
ledger_scope_descriptions.economic_ledger: Economic ledger (ID 5001) where per-file clearing and consumer available balances are reversed.

accounting_treatments.description: Contra-entry reversal of a previously recorded deposit allocation, correcting an error by reversing the original postings without creating new economic exposure.

account_code_validations.description: Consumer deposit hold liability (economic ledger) debited to reverse the prior allocation credit.
Per-file clearing instance (Master FBO - Clearing) credited to reverse the prior allocation debit, restoring the clearing balance.
Consumer Master FBO Clearing liability (allocation ledger) debited to reverse the prior allocation credit.
Cash Balances - Clearing asset (allocation ledger) credited to reverse the prior allocation debit.

original_allocation_file_id.description: Identifier of the allocation file containing the incorrect line item.

original_statement_file_id.description: Identifier of the bank statement file linked to the original allocation.

original_event_id.description: UUID of the original T5101 deposit-allocation event being reversed.

reversal_timestamp.description: Timestamp of the reversal decision/approval in ISO 8601 format.

approver.description: Identity of the analyst/approver authorizing the reversal.

legs.description: Reverse the consumer's deposit allocation: restore the per-file clearing balance and unwind the hold.
Mirror the allocation reversal on the allocation ledger for FDIC tracking.

examples.name: wrong_consumer_reversal_8000
examples.description: Wrong consumer: $8,000.00 was allocated to Consumer A but should have been Consumer B. Reversal of the Customer A allocation.
